prompt: Create a vertical anime-style cinematic illustration of a young woman sightseeing on a crowded traditional Japanese shrine shopping street during cherry blossom season. The main subject stands in the foreground, seen from behind and slightly in profile, with her face intentionally covered by a plain opaque square censor block in muted brown. She has long flowing warm chestnut brown hair with loose strands glowing in the sunlight, decorated with small pink and white flower hair ornaments. She wears a sheer pale pink floral kimono-style cardigan over a soft blue skirt, carrying 3 visible accessories: a black shoulder camera hanging at her hip, a dark navy handbag on her arm, and a small pink charm pouch clipped to the bag. The background shows a busy shrine approach packed with tourists, traditional wooden storefronts on both sides, 2 visible red paper lanterns with white Japanese characters on the left, and 2 red torii gates aligned down the street, one large gate in the mid-background and a smaller gate farther behind it. Add drifting sakura petals, warm golden late-afternoon backlight, lens flare from the upper right, soft depth of field with the crowd and shrine architecture blurred into the distance, highly detailed painterly anime rendering, delicate linework, romantic travel atmosphere, 9:16 portrait composition, vibrant but natural colors, no readable modern signage emphasized.
